name: write_hwx
short_description: Writes the hardware files archive for the current design for use in the Labtool
full_help:
write_hwx

Description: 
Writes the hardware files archive for the current design for use in the Labtool

Syntax: 
write_hwx  [-force] [-bit <arg>] [-bin <arg>] [-ll <arg>] [-msk <arg>]
           [-nky <arg>] [-rbt <arg>] [-ltx <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
The name of the hw file

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Overwrite existing hardware archive file
  [-bit]      Bitstream file 
  [-bin]      Binary configuration data file with no header information
  [-ll]       Logical location file
  [-msk]      Mask file
  [-nky]      Encryption key file
  [-rbt]      Raw bit file
  [-ltx]      Debug probes file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>      Hardware archive file
              Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters and .hwx 
              extension.

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Binary configuration data file with no header information
Suspend message limits during command execution
